title: 2020 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This is a navigation index page listing 14 FOMC statements from 2020. It contains only dates, titles, and category tags for each press release—no substantive policy content, decisions, or statements. The actual individual statements are separate documents not included here.
key_points: Page is an index listing 14 FOMC statements from throughout 2020 (Jan 29 through Dec 16)
Includes dates, titles, and 'Monetary Policy' category tags for each release
Six meetings included economic projections in addition to statements
Actual statement text, decisions, and forward guidance are not present in this source
Last update date shown is February 26, 2026
why_it_matters: This source provides no archiveable policy content. It is a directory page to individual FOMC statements that would need to be fetched separately. The historical 2020 FOMC actions are highly significant (emergency rate cuts, QE programs during COVID), but this page does not contain them.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page (per source metadata and DOMAIN_TRUST_TIER designation), which Core Rule 5 explicitly requires rejecting

notes: Source is a non-archiveable navigation index. The individual 2020 FOMC statements (particularly March 3, March 15, March 23, and December 16) contain the actual policy decisions from the COVID emergency response period and would be relevant archive material if fetched separately.
